SUMCO RESEARCH

DASHBOARD SUMMARYAt-a-Glance View
SUMMARY — Aggregates key metrics from all pages. Price = latest nearby settlement. S/U = current year stocks-to-use. Fair Value from best-fit regression. MM Net = managed money net position. Pctile = 5yr percentile. Click any row to jump to that page.
COMMODITY OVERVIEW
SPREAD HEATMAP 5yr Percentile & Z-Score
ENERGY INVENTORIES
SUMCO RESEARCH
USDA World Agricultural Supply & Demand Estimates
USDA S&D — World & US balance sheets from the USDA PSD database. Production, consumption, trade, and ending stocks for major commodities. 2015–2026 (11 marketing years). Stocks-to-Use ratio is the key metric — lower S/U = tighter supplies = typically higher prices.

(1000 MT)

SUMCO RESEARCH
USDA AMS Export Inspections & USDA FAS Weekly Export Sales
EXPORT INSPECTIONS & SALES — Weekly US grain export data from USDA. Tracks actual shipments leaving US ports and weekly sales bookings. Compares current marketing year pace vs prior years to gauge demand strength.
SUMCO RESEARCH
Stocks-to-Use vs Price Regression Analysis
REGRESSION — Fits a curve to the historical stocks-to-use vs price relationship. Produces a "fair value" for current S/U levels. R² = fit quality. Premium/discount = how far price deviates from fundamentals. up to 26 data points (2000–2025).
BEST FIT SUMMARY Click a row to load that combination
STOCKS/USE vs PRICE
FAIR VALUE
RESIDUALS (PREMIUM / DISCOUNT)
PRICE vs FAIR VALUE BAND

AG & MACRO CALENDAR — Report dates for USDA (WASDE, export sales, crop progress), CFTC COT, AAFC, Stats Canada, EIA petroleum, FOMC, and other central bank decisions.

SUMCO RESEARCH
CFTC Disaggregated COT
COMMITMENTS OF TRADERS — Weekly CFTC positioning data. Shows how commercials (hedgers), swap dealers, and managed money (specs) are positioned. Net positioning extremes often signal sentiment turning points. ~10 years of weekly data.
MARKET COMMERCIAL MANAGED MONEY — NET MANAGED MONEY — POSITIONING OPEN INTEREST
Net Chg Net Chg Net%OI Gross L Gross S L%OI Max L%OI S%OI Max S%OI OI Chg
SUMCO RESEARCH
Cash Grain Prices · HAMMERSMITH Reports · hammersmithltd.blogspot.com
CASH PRICES — Spot prices and basis levels for physical grain at key delivery points. Shows the relationship between local cash markets and futures — reflects local supply/demand, transport costs, and storage economics.
FOB EXPORT PRICE HISTORY USD / MT by Origin
CURRENT FOB EXPORT PRICES USD / MT · Sorted most expensive → cheapest
SOURCE: HAMMERSMITH
Loading latest Hammersmith report...
SUMCO RESEARCH
Canadian Grain Commission — Grain Statistics Weekly · 2025-2026 · gsw-shg.grainscanada.gc.ca
GRAIN STATS WEEKLY — Weekly cumulative data from the Canadian Grain Commission. Deliveries, exports, domestic use, and visible supply. Shows current year pace vs 2020–2025. Key indicator of Canadian export program progress.
SUMCO RESEARCH
EIA Short-Term Energy Outlook — Global & U.S. Energy Balance · March 2026 STEO + Weekly Petroleum Status
EIA PETROLEUM & NAT GAS — US weekly petroleum and natural gas storage data from the Energy Information Administration. Crude oil, gasoline, distillate, and natural gas inventories with 5-year range bands. Includes STEO (Short-Term Energy Outlook) forecasts.
U.S. PETROLEUM STOCKS vs 5-YEAR AVERAGE & RANGE · THOUSAND BARRELS
CRUDE OIL (EX-SPR) Weekly Ending Stocks · Thousand Barrels

SUMCO RESEARCH
Agriculture & Agri-Food Canada — Outlook for Principal Field Crops · February 18, 2026
AAFC — Canadian crop supply & demand from Agriculture & Agri-Food Canada. Area, yield, production, trade, and ending stocks for Canadian crops. Updated monthly.
SUMCO RESEARCH
Spread Analytics & Correlations
INTERMARKET SPREADS — Price ratios and differentials between related commodities. Soybean/corn ratio (drives US planting >2.4), crush margins, oil share, cross-exchange spreads. 5-year percentile rankings and z-scores show whether a spread is historically cheap or rich.
Commodity Spreads & Ratios
SUMCO RESEARCH
Crop Breakeven Calculator
CROP CALCULATOR — Interactive tool for estimating crop production and profitability by region. Adjust area, yield, and price to model scenarios for wheat, corn, soybeans, and canola.
Production Cost Breakeven Analysis
SUMCO RESEARCH
Seasonal Price Overlays · Weekly Closes Indexed by Marketing Year
SEASONAL CHARTS — Daily futures prices indexed to each commodity's marketing year. Overlays multiple years to reveal seasonal patterns — planting anxiety, weather premiums, harvest pressure. Current year vs 5yr and 15yr averages. 2011–2026.
SUMCO RESEARCH
Data Sources & Update Links
DATA SOURCES & UPDATE GUIDE
All sources used to build this dashboard. Sources are split into two categories: data you can download and upload to update the dashboard yourself, and reference material that informs the dashboard but cannot be self-updated.
● SELF-UPDATABLE — download file → upload to Claude with this dashboard

HOW TO UPDATE

USDA S&D Tables — Download psd_alldata_csv.zip from PSD Online below → upload zip + this dashboard file to Claude → say "update with fresh data".
COT Positions — Download the current year's com_disagg_xls_YYYY.zip from CFTC Historical Compressed below → upload zip + this file to Claude → say "update COT data".
EIA Petroleum — Download psw01.xls and psw04.xls from the EIA WPSR page → upload both + this file to Claude.
EIA Natural Gas — Download ngshistory.xls from EIA Natural Gas Weekly → upload + this file to Claude.
Wheat by Class — Download the quarterly spreadsheet from USDA ERS (link below) → upload + this file to Claude → say "update wheat by class data".
Cash Grain Prices — Open the latest Hammersmith weekly report → paste the FOB price table into Claude with this file → say "update cash prices". Current data: March 14, 2026.

CFTC — Commitments of Traders DOWNLOAD TO UPDATE

Historical Compressed — Disaggregated · com_disagg_xls_YYYY.zip
Download the current year zip · Agricultural futures: Grains, Oilseeds, Softs, Livestock · Energy also available · Current data in dashboard: 2019–2026
Current Week — Disaggregated COT
Released every Friday ~3:30pm ET · Most recent week's positioning · Can upload individual weekly file if mid-year update needed

USDA — Global S&D (PSD Online) DOWNLOAD TO UPDATE

PSD Online — Bulk Download · psd_alldata_csv.zip
Full global S&D database · Updated monthly with each WASDE release · Covers: Wheat, Corn, Soybeans, Soy Meal/Oil, Canola, Cotton, Beef · All countries included

USDA ERS — Wheat by Class (US) DOWNLOAD TO UPDATE

USDA ERS — Wheat Data · Quarterly Supply & Disappearance by Class
Download the "U.S. wheat supply and disappearance by class (quarterly)" Excel file · Contains HRW, HRS, SRW, White Wheat, Durum annual balance sheets · Updated each WASDE cycle · Current data in dashboard: 2010/11 – 2024/25

EIA — Petroleum & Natural Gas DOWNLOAD TO UPDATE

EIA — Weekly Petroleum Status Report · psw01.xls + psw04.xls
Released every Wednesday 10:30am ET · psw01.xls = stocks & supply · psw04.xls = stocks by PADD & products · Download both and upload to Claude
EIA — Weekly Natural Gas Storage · ngshistory.xls
Released every Thursday 10:30am ET · Tracks Total Lower 48, East, Midwest, South Central regions in Bcf · Download from the EIA Natural Gas Weekly page

CASH GRAIN PRICES PASTE TO UPDATE

HAMMERSMITH — Weekly USA Grain & Protein Report
FOB export prices: Wheat classes (US, Ukraine, Russia, France, Argentina), Corn, Barley, Soybeans, Soymeal · Published every Friday · Copy the FOB price table and paste to Claude · Current data: March 14, 2026
PDQ — Western Canadian Cash Grain Prices (Alberta Grains)
CWRS, CPSR, CWAD, Canola, Yellow Peas · Spot & deferred bids by region · Updated daily ~2pm CST · Copy price table from browser to paste to Claude
○ REFERENCE ONLY — informs the dashboard, cannot be self-updated

USDA — WASDE & WEEKLY EXPORT DATA

WASDE Report — World Agricultural Supply and Demand Estimates
Released ~2nd Tuesday of each month at 12:00pm ET · Source for all S&D numbers; the PSD download above reflects the latest WASDE estimates
USDA GATS — Export Sales & Inspections
Weekly Export Sales (Thu 8:30am ET) · Weekly Export Inspections (Mon 11am ET) · Reference for trade pace tracking in the export panel

CANADIAN REPORTS

Canadian Grain Commission (CGC) — Weekly Export Data
Released every Thursday · Reference for Canadian export pace tracking
Statistics Canada — Crop Reports
Last Wednesday of month, September–January · Production and area estimates for Canadian crops
AAFC — Canadian Supply/Demand Reports
2nd Thursday of each month · Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada monthly domestic S&D

ENERGY & MACRO

NOPA — Monthly Soybean Crush Report
Released ~15th of the following month · National Oilseed Processors Association monthly crush volume · Reference for US soy crush pace
Federal Reserve — FOMC Meeting Calendar
Rate decisions released ~2pm ET on decision day · Reference for macro calendar in the dashboard
BLS — US Employment Situation (Non-Farm Payrolls)
First Friday of each month at 8:30am ET · Reference for macro calendar
